summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HERTZ-PRO vehicle catalogue site. All backend APIs working perfectly (8/8 tests passed). Frontend fully functional with hero section, vehicle catalogue, detail pages, contact form, and mobile responsiveness all working correctly.
passed_tests: Vehicle listing API /api/vehicles returns VW T-Roc data
Vehicle detail API /api/vehicles/{id} with complete data structure
Contact form API /api/contact saves messages correctly
Homepage loads with hero section and trust badges
Vehicle catalogue displays with discount badges (-20%)
Vehicle card navigation to detail page /vehicule/{id}
Vehicle detail page gallery with 4 photos and navigation arrows
Vehicle specs table shows all 6 specifications
Vehicle options list displays all 21 options correctly
Vehicle history section shows 4 maintenance records
Contact page loads with form and business info
Contact form submission works (nom, email, telephone, message)
Mobile responsive design with working header menu
All interactive buttons clickable and properly integrated
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all UI components and integrations working)
